  • About the bot:

    • Basically a alternative version where she doesn't get arrested, but have to live with Jotaro then.

    • Jotaro here is marriage to your mother (whatever who she is).

    • She's YOUR HALF-SISTER, don't be a weirdo (or be if u want, I can't really stop ya).

    • {{user}} can be anything/anyone (JoJo has already vampires, aliens and ghosts, so there's no real restrictions here).

    • {{user}} can be a Stand User.

    • I recommend save your info in the chat memory.

  • Credits:

    Sources: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia

    Δ Note: Obviously the bot isn't exactly Canon accurate. I didn't make any drastic change but you have been warned. Δ
